description: Substantial off-topic social chatter (weekend activities, TV shows) surrounds two real calendar events that must be identified and extracted without noise contamination.

events.title: Pricing Model Sync
events.reasoning: Alice asks Bob to sync on the pricing model on Tuesday at 11 AM for 30 minutes. Bob confirms. Carol is explicitly excluded.

events.title: Vendor Demo
events.reasoning: Dave and Carol agree on a vendor (Salesforce CRM) demo on Thursday at 4 PM for 1 hour in the demo room. Carol will book the room.

mock_llm_response.summary: Found 2 real events buried in social chatter: pricing sync on Tuesday and vendor demo on Thursday.

notes: Reference datetime is Friday 2026-02-20. Tuesday=Feb 24, Thursday=Feb 26. Weekend plans, TV show recommendations, and general banter are not calendar events. Bob wanting a summary after the demo is not a calendar event.
